Title: Navas, Juan Gualberto López-Valdemoro y de Quesada, conde de las
Full Name: Navas, Juan Gualberto López-Valdemoro y de Quesada, conde de las
Overview: Published the volume on The Royal Palace Madrid, in the "Art in Spain" series by the Hispanic Society of America.
Selected Bibliography: Guadalajara. Alcalá de Henares. Art in Spain, [published] under the Patronage of the Hispanic Society of America. Barcelona: Hijos de J. Thomas, 1913.
